Thomas Joannes Stieltjes was born in 1856, at Wolfenbüttel, a small town in the German Empire (now part of the state of Lower Saxony), to a family of modest means. He was the second of three children of a Lutheran pastor. The father died when Stieltjes was six years old, and the family moved to Zwolle, in the Netherlands, where he grew up.
